scenario.name: KubeVoIP Register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: daniel <sip:daniel@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: daniel <sip:daniel@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:daniel@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 300 Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [authentication username=daniel password=phone-password] From: daniel <sip:daniel@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: daniel <sip:daniel@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:daniel@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 300 Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
